rapidApiKey.title: RapidAPI key (API-Football)
rapidApiKey.description: Your RapidAPI key for the API-Football (api-football-v1) endpoint. Get one at https://rapidapi.com/api-sports/api/api-football.

notificationEmail.title: Notification email
notificationEmail.description: Email address that will receive a message for every goal.

homeTeam.title: Home team
homeTeam.description: Team name to match (case-insensitive substring). Used to auto-resolve the fixture when no Fixture ID is given.

awayTeam.title: Away team
awayTeam.description: The other team name to match (case-insensitive substring).

matchDate.title: Match date (UTC, YYYY-MM-DD)
matchDate.description: Date the match takes place, in UTC. Leave empty to search today's fixtures. Ignored when Fixture ID is set.

fixtureId.title: Fixture ID (optional override)
fixtureId.description: API-Football fixture ID. If provided, team/date auto-resolution is skipped. Most reliable option.

pollIntervalSecs.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSecs.description: How often to check the match for new goals.

notifyOnKickoffAndFullTime.title: Also email on kickoff & full-time
notifyOnKickoffAndFullTime.description: Send an extra email when the match kicks off and when it finishes.

maxRuntimeSecs.title: Max runtime (seconds)
maxRuntimeSecs.description: Hard stop for the watcher, in case the match status never reaches a finished state.
